title: tuple
description: Fixed-length mixed tuple [Date, number, string, null, string[], bigint]. The Date slot encodes to an ISO string and the bigint slot to a decimal string; number, string, null and the string[] slot pass through unchanged.
notes: Per-slot wire transforms: Date↔ISO string and bigint↔decimal string; the decoder restores each slot from its scalar form.
pureType: createJsonEncoder<[Date, number, string, null, string[], bigint]>(undefined, {strategy: 'clone'})
schema: createJsonEncoder(RT.tuple([RT.date(), RT.number(), RT.string(), RT.literal(null), RT.array(RT.string()), RT.bigint()]))
